title: IterationEvaluatorOutput
description: Structured output from the iteration_evaluator agent.

goal_achieved.description: True if the GOAL was successfully achieved, false otherwise.

summary.description: A multi-sentence high-level summary of the current iteration's behavior, including any overarching interpretations or theories.

evaluation.description: List of diagnostic issues with the current or previous iterations.

summary.description: Short title or classification of the issue (e.g., 'throws KeyError')

details.description: Log output or test results that support the summary.
